full_text:
Li Yong śĚéśįł
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yong (śĚéśįł)was born in Fu Chun. An attentive man, he was murdered by Dian Wei on order of a rival. Li Yong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
